overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting a character exploring an ancient Egyptian city with Greco-Roman architecture. The character walks through sunlit cobblestone streets, enters a covered colonnade to skin a dead crocodile, and continues through market areas with hanging banners and sphinx statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city thoroughfare with statues and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sunlit cobblestone street toward the distant obelisk

notable_agents.action: camel with rider walking along the right side of the street

entered.detail: tall stone column topped with a statue visible at the end of the street
tall palm tree in the center median of the street
large stone building with multiple columns and red-striped awnings
statue mounted on a tall pedestal on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide, sunlit cobblestone street lined with classical stone architecture. A tall obelisk stands in the distance while palm trees provide sparse shade. A camel rider passes by on the right as the character approaches a covered colonnade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade with merchant stalls and large planters

events.description: enters covered colonnade from the open street, light becomes dappled

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway between large stone columns

entered.detail: wooden ceiling structure casting striped shadows on the ground
large ceramic planter with blue and gold patterns containing a palm
decorative wooden lattice wall on the left side of the colonnade
wooden table with goods displayed under the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered colonnade with stone columns and a wooden roof that casts striped shadows on the tiled floor. Large decorated planters and merchant stalls line the walkway. The obelisk and entrance statues fade from view as the character moves deeper into the shaded walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: merchant stall area with dead crocodile on display

events.description: character crouches and begins skinning a dead crocodile with a knife
character finishes skinning the crocodile and stands up

agents.ego_description: crouching over a dead crocodile and performing a skinning animation with a blade

notable_agents.action: dead crocodile lying on a mat being skinned by the character

entered.detail: large deceased crocodile lying on a woven mat on the ground
simple wooden table near the crocodile

segments.scene_description: The character stops to interact with a dead crocodile lying on a mat in the colonnade. The camera focuses on the skinning animation as the character uses a blade to harvest the hide. The surrounding area includes wooden tables and large planters while dappled sunlight filters through the roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with hanging banners and sphinx statue

events.description: exits the covered colonnade back into the open street
horse rider passes by from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the market street passing various NPCs and stalls

notable_agents.action: horse with rider trotting past the character

entered.detail: vertical fabric banners hanging across the street
merchant stall with prominent red fabric awning
large white stone sphinx statue visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the colonnade into a bustling market street with hanging banners and stalls with red awnings. A horse rider passes by as the character walks toward a large stone sphinx statue visible further down the road. The street is moderately crowded with pedestrians browsing the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill path with sphinx statue and walled gardens

events.description: begins ascending the uphill cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: walking uphill past the sphinx statue toward the higher elevation buildings

entered.detail: stone walls with greenery and trees enclosed within
stone seating near the sphinx statue

segments.scene_description: The character ascends an uphill cobblestone path passing a large white sphinx statue on the right. Walled garden enclosures with lush greenery line the left side of the path. The street continues upward toward elevated buildings at the top of the incline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit thoroughfare into a shaded colonnade and finally up an ascending market street. It begins on a bright cobblestone road lined with classical architecture and palm trees, moving past a camel rider toward a distant obelisk. As the character enters a covered colonnade, the open sunlight shifts into striped shadows cast by a wooden roof over tiled floors and merchant stalls. The camera then pauses to focus on the character skinning a dead crocodile on a mat before exiting the shade and emerging into a bustling market filled with red awnings and hanging banners. Finally, the scene opens up as the character walks past a large white sphinx statue and lush garden enclosures, ascending an uphill path toward elevated buildings.
